docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text:
Warning

Still in a early stage. At the moment only exporting from google photos is supported.

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text:
Immichporter exports google photos information into a database which can be used to import the information back into immich.

Important

This tool does not download any images from google photos. It only exports the information into a database.

Use google takeout to export your google photos data and the immich-go tool to import the data into immich. After this you can use immichporter to create all albums and add people to shared albums.

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
Using uv (recommended): 

uv add immichporter

Or with pip: 

pip install immichporter

docs.title: Usage
docs.text:
# Show help
immichporter --help

playwright install # might be required the first time

# login is required the first time, the session is saved
immichporter gphotos login

# add all albums to the database
immichporter gphotos albums

# add all photos for each album to the database
# it can run multiple times and only processes the not fully processed albums again
immichporter gphotos photos

# multiple runs might be needed until everything is correct,
# you can check with if every album is fully processed
immichporter db show-albums --not-finished

# edit/update users
immichporter db show-users
immichporter db edit-users # select which users should be added to immich

# see the database with https://sqlitebrowser.org
sqlitebrowser immichporter.db

docs.title: TODO:
docs.text:
• export albums with photos and people from gphotos (first version)
  • import to immich
  • improve documentation
  • imporve gphotos export stability

docs.title: Development
docs.text:
To set up the development environment:

# Clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/burgdev/immichporter.git
cd immichporter

# Install development dependencies
make
uv run invoke install # install 'dev' and 'test' dependencies per default, use --all to install all dependencies

docs.title: Changelog
docs.text:
All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on Keep a Changelog, and this project adheres to Semantic Versioning.

docs.title: 🚀 Features
docs.text:
• Add db edit user command (#4)
  • Improve db show albums command (#3)

docs.title: 📝 Documentation
docs.text: • Add documentation and pypi link to README. (#2)
🚀 Initial release with google photos export to database.

docs.title: PyPi
docs.text:
The package is published to PyPi package.

uvpipxpip

Run it as uv tool:

$ uvx immichporter [OPTIONS] [ARGS]...

Install it in isolated environment with pipx:

$ pipx install immichporter
$ immichporter [OPTIONS] [COMMAND] [ARGS]...

Install it with pip:

$ pip install immichporter
$ immichporter [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

docs.title: immichporter
docs.text:
Immichporter - Import photos from various sources to Immich.

Modules:

    Main CLI entry point for immichporter package.

    Database operations for immichporter.

    Database module for immichporter.

  • gphotos –

    Google Photos source module for immichporter.

  • immich –

    Immich target module for immichporter.

  • models –

    Shared database models for immichporter.

  • schemas –

    Schemas for album and photos.

  • utils –

    Utility functions for immichporter.

docs.title: database
docs.text:
Database operations for immichporter.

Functions:

  • get_db_session –

    Get a database session. Initializes and migrates the database if needed.

  • init_database –

    Initialize the database and apply any necessary migrations.

  • insert_or_update_album –

    Insert or update an album from AlbumInfo object.

  • insert_or_update_user –

    Insert or update a user.

  • insert_photo –

    Insert a photo, returning the photo ID if successful, None if duplicate.

  • insert_error –

    Insert an error.

  • link_user_to_album –

    Link a user to an album.

  • album_exists –

    Check if an album exists by title.

  • get_album_photos_count –

    Get the number of photos for an album.

    Get the number of processed items for an album.

    Update the number of processed items for an album.

  • is_album_fully_processed –

    Check if an album is fully processed.

  • get_albums_from_db –

    Get albums from database with pagination.

  • get_users_from_db –

    Get all users from database.

  • get_database_stats –

    Get database statistics.

Interactively edit user information in the database.

    max_albums,
    start_album,
    start_album_fresh,
    album_id,
    not_finished,
    db_path,

    log_level,
    clear_storage,

)

Export photos from Google Photos albums.

By default, processes all albums. Use --album-id to process specific albums.

docs.title: STEALTH_INIT_SCRIPT module-attribute
docs.text:
STEALTH_INIT_SCRIPT = "
Object.defineProperty(navigator, 'webdriver', { get: () => undefined });
Object.defineProperty(navigator, 'languages', { get: () => ['en-US','en'] });
Object.defineProperty(navigator, 'plugins', { get: () => [1,2,3,4,5] });
window.chrome = window.chrome || { runtime: {} };
"

Utility functions for immichporter.

  • sanitize_for_email –

    Sanitize a name for use in an email address.

docs.title: sanitize_for_email
docs.text:
sanitize_for_email(name: str) -> str

Sanitize a name for use in an email address.

Replaces spaces with dots, converts to lowercase, and removes umlauts.
